summary: Tested Phase 10: Admin Superpowers - All 4 new features fully functional. Backend: 15/15 tests PASSED. Frontend: All UI components working correctly. Features: 10A Unified Approval Center, 10B Refund Manager Enhanced, 10C Revenue Dashboard Enhanced, 10D Custom Report Builder.

10A_approval_center_api.details: Returns items array with pending sales, pre-assessments, documents, urgent tickets. Summary shows counts for each type. Items have id, type, title, subtitle, priority, created_at. Admin-only access enforced.

10A_approval_center_ui.details: 5 summary cards (Pending Sales: 13, Pre-Assessments: 0, Documents: 15, Urgent Tickets: 1, Total: 29). Search input, type filter dropdown, refresh button. Items list with Approve/Reject buttons. Reject dialog opens correctly.

10B_refund_manager_api.details: Returns refunds array, pa_refunds_pending, eligible_for_refund, stats (total_refunded, total_count, pa_pending_count, pa_pending_amount), monthly_trend. Admin-only access enforced.

10B_refund_manager_ui.details: 4 stats cards (Total Refunded: ₹20,410, PA Refunds Pending: 1, Eligible for Refund: 33, Monthly Trend). 3 tabs (Refund History, PA Refunds Pending, Issue New Refund). Tab switching works. Refund history table with search.

10C_revenue_dashboard_api.details: Returns summary (total_revenue, total_received, total_pending, total_commission, total_refunded, net_revenue, pa_revenue, total_sales), monthly_trend, by_partner, by_product, payment_methods. Admin-only access enforced.

10C_revenue_dashboard_ui.details: 4 top stats cards (Total Revenue: ₹19.27L, Collected: ₹7.94L, Commission Paid: ₹1.10L, Net Revenue: ₹7.74L). Monthly Revenue Trend chart with 1 month data. 3 breakdown tabs (By Partner: 2 partners, By Service: 5 products, By Payment Method: 3 methods).

10D_report_builder_api.details: 6 report templates available (revenue_summary, partner_performance, case_status, client_list, pre_assessment_report, refund_report). Generate endpoint returns title, rows, summary, columns. All 6 report types generate correctly. Invalid type returns 400.

10D_report_builder_ui.details: 6 template cards visible. Revenue Summary generates report with 28 records. Summary stats (Total Fee: ₹19.27L, Total Received: ₹7.94L, Total Pending: ₹11.33L, Total Commission: ₹1.10L). CSV download button, Print/PDF button, Back to Templates button. Custom filters section with Report Type, Date From/To, Partner, Product, Status filters.

admin_only_access.details: All 4 endpoints correctly return 403 Forbidden for non-admin users (tested with partner role)

design_issues.issue: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent
design_issues.note: Accessibility warning, not a functional issue

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components should have aria-describedby for accessibility compliance
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 10 Admin Superpowers fully functional. 4 new endpoints under /api/admin-super/: approval-center, refund-manager, revenue-dashboard, report-templates, report-builder/generate. All admin-only. Approval Center shows 29 pending items. Revenue Dashboard shows ₹19.27L total revenue. Report Builder has 6 templates. Sidebar restructured with 'Reports & Analytics' group containing Report Builder.
